commit.subject: LU-18441 tests: replacing getquota() in quota test_0-1j
commit.message:
LU-18441 tests: replacing getquota() in quota test_0-1j

Replaced getquota() and single bracket conditionals in
tests 0 to 1j in sanity-quota.sh

Signed-off-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2a25e7ad386060fb0335a221b7b14973b00d8f88
